candidate_definition_hints.text: A full-featured regex engine in pure Go based on the .NET engine

Regexp2 is a feature-rich RegExp engine for Go. It doesn't have constant time guarantees like the built-in `regexp` package, but it allows backtracking and is compatible with Perl5 and .NET. You'll likely be better off with the RE2 engine from the `regexp` package and should onl…
